headline.vsl_adaptation: There's a sex pill that has been used in China for 63 years. It restores a man's sex drive and triggers strong, long-lasting erections without the side effects of Viagra. And it's now available in the United States...

lead.opening_verbatim: A pill that restores a man's sex drive and triggers strong, long lasting erections without side effects has been used in China for 63 years. It is now available in the United States.
lead.hook_mechanism: 63-year longevity proof + no side effects contrast to Viagra
lead.transition_to_body: This amazing pill contains ingredients that not only resolve sexual health problems in men, but also boost lost testosterone levels in the body.

mechanism.mechanism_description: Ancient Oriental medicine ingredients trigger massive release of testosterone in the body. When the pill absorbs, ingredients are released into the blood where they begin restoring testosterone and libido levels. Also contains an ingredient that 'switches off' the chemical in a man's body that causes his erections to go soft.

proof_elements.verbatim: has been used in China for 63 years
Viotren's recent media exposure on CBS, CNN, MSNBC, and FOX News
Improvements in your sex drive and ability to get and maintain an erection start within the first 72-hours

key_sections.content_verbatim: Viotren contains ingredients that trigger a massive release of testosterone in the body. As a result, your sex drive is quickly restored. So is your ability to get and maintain an erection.

The origin of Viotren is in ancient Oriental medicine. Scientists now know that there are many remedies from Oriental medicine that are proving very effective in clinical studies. This particular Oriental remedy was brought to market commercially by a Chinese pharmaceutical company in 1953.
Improvements in your sex drive and ability to get and maintain an erection start within the first 72-hours.

doctor_endorsements.quote: Many Viotren users note an increased sense of well-being, vitality, and sexual performance in the first 30 days.
doctor_endorsements.credentials: Has appeared on award winning T.V. shows like The Doctors, and PBS's Healing Quest

doctor_endorsements.quote: I recommend Viotren to men who find it difficult to become aroused. It does wonders for your sexual appetite. Your sexual sensitivity. Even for your staying power and stamina.
Viotren is a good choice for men who feel they have passed their peak. The results of using this pill can be an increase in energy levels, vigor, and a decrease in depressive mood.
doctor_endorsements.credentials: Integrative Cardiologist and Professional Committee Member of the America Heart Association

testimonials.quote: I'm 68 years old and I have been suffering from erection problems for the past 10 years. Up until now, I've only used Viagra which is very expensive and gives me terrible headaches. Viotren has worked great for me. I wish I had known testosterone was my problem years ago. My erections are strong like before and the stress of not being able to perform is gone.

My doctor told me prescription drugs were the only answer, but I did not want to go down that route. Now when I feel my erections are not as strong as they should be, or I lose desire for sex, I begin taking Viotren. Within a few days, as reliable as clockwork, everything returns to normal and I'm able to function like I used to as a younger man.

Since my early 50's I have experienced sexual dysfunction. My doctor told me I was just getting old, words no man wants to hear. But then I saw something about Viotren on the CBS News website and decided to give it a try. Boy am I glad I did. This pill has performed a miracle on my sex life.
